channel.title: Resilience on Validated Patterns
channel.description: Recent content in Resilience on Validated Patterns

item.title: Portworx DR
item.description: This pattern demonstrates the use of Red Hat Ansible Automation Platform to configure and execute Portworx Enterprise Disaster Recovery.

item.title: NetApp DR Starter Kit
item.description: This pattern provides a starter kit for implementing disaster recovery (DR) using NetApp solutions. It includes best practices, reference architectures, and deployment guides to help organizations quickly set up and manage their DR environments with NetApp technologies.

item.title: Trilio Continuous Restore
item.description: A demonstration of Trilio Continuous Restore for stateful applications

item.title: Omnicloud as a Service
item.description: This pattern deploys Omnicloud as a Service, abstracting away the complexities of infrastructure setup.

item.title: RamenDR Starter Kit
item.description: This pattern demonstrates the use of Red Hat OpenShift Data Foundations for Virtualization Regional Disaster Recovery

item.title: Telco Hub
item.description: The Telco Hub pattern is a GitOps-first validated pattern for deploying and operating a Telco-focused management hub.

item.title: GPFS Tester
item.description: This pattern demonstrates the integration of Global Parallel File System (GPFS/IBM Fusion) with Red Hat OpenShift and includes performance testing as part of the demo as a benefit to product teams and customers.

item.title: Virtualization Starter Kit
item.description: This pattern uses OpenShift Virtualization to host VMs.

item.title: Ingress Mesh BGP
item.description: This pattern demonstrates multi-cluster service mesh networking using MetalLB with BGP and Red Hat Service Interconnect (Skupper) for cross-cluster connectivity.

item.title: OpenShift Virtualization Data Protection with Veeam Kasten
item.description: This pattern uses OpenShift Virtualization to simulate an edge environment for VMs, protected by Veeam Kasten.

item.title: Regional Disaster Recovery
item.description: This variant of the Validated Patterns framework deploys a Regional Disaster Recovery Setup across multiple different regions

item.title: HyperShift
item.description: This pattern is for deploying the Hosted Control Plane (HyperShift) service.

item.title: Multicloud GitOps with Portworx Enterprise
item.description: This pattern helps you develop and deploy applications on an open hybrid cloud in a stable, simple, and secure way. It includes persistent storage for stateful applications.

item.title: Cockroach
item.description: A multicloud pattern using cockroachdb and submariner, deployed via RHACM.

item.title: Multicloud GitOps
item.description: This pattern helps you develop and deploy applications on an open hybrid cloud in a stable, simple, and secure way.
